name: Harald
description: Nobody knows why Harald is here. Not even Harald.

name: JD
description: Always has a plan. None of them work.

name: MrFork
description: Carries a rusty fork into every battle.

name: Plinky
description: Makes strange noises when nobody is watching.

name: Snaker
description: Silent. Cold. Probably plotting something.

name: Froggy
description: Jumps first. Thinks later.

name: Empty
description: There is absolutely nothing here.

name: Alpaka
description: Spits at danger with remarkable accuracy.

name: Jerk
description: Nobody likes him. He likes that.

name: Wanderer
description: Crawling in the woods for worms. He likes them.

name: Mechanic
description: Can fix anything except himself.

name: Ant
description: Small enough to ignore. Big mistake.

name: Fisher
description: Patiently waiting for a bite that never comes.

name: Slave
description: Works until the end. Then keeps going.

name: Dealer
description: A smile, a card, and a terrible bargain.

name: Händler
description: Every trade leaves someone poorer.

name: Headshot
description: Legends begin and end with a single bullet.

name: Walker
description: He walked out of the fog and never stopped.

name: Mr_Mr
description: Some say there are two of him. Others say more.

name: Falling
description: Nobody survives the fall. Yet it keeps returning.

name: Tree
description: Its roots reach places that should not exist.

name: Princess
description: Her kingdom vanished long ago, but she remains.

name: UltraCockHaze
description: A being so rare that even reality rejects it.
